LanguageData.TranscendentDropPods.label: nano relay drop
LanguageData.TranscendentDropPods.description: Broadcast a forged nano-command uplink that hijacks nearby logistics satellites, forcing rapid deployment of several single-use strike pods onto the selected zone.
LanguageData.BloodfeedUniverse.label: bloodfeed universe
LanguageData.BloodfeedUniverse.description: Drain blood from any living nearby pawn, including hostile targets. Causes heavier blood loss and grants more hemogen than normal bloodfeed.
LanguageData.NanoDisassemblyTransit.label: nano disassembly transit
LanguageData.NanoDisassemblyTransit.description: Initiate the integrated nano-transit matrix and convert the body into a compressed subatomic data stream. Trillions of nanomachines encode molecular and neural states, relay the packet through synchronized orbital nodes, then reassemble matter at the destination with atomic precision.
